item.title: Download Clean Space Pro 2026 v719

item.title: Download LightBulb 2.7
item.description: LightBulb is a small application that can help to reduce eye strain at night by automatically adjusting the gamma of your display based on the current time of the day. The program uses the configured color temperatures to determine the output channel for day and night and apply the smoothest transition between them at dawn and dusk. You can adjust the temperature values for day and night based on your interests and also can customize the conversion window and preview your settings with...

item.title: Download Perfinity dotNET Runtime Analyzer 9.0.19
item.description: Perfinity dotNET Runtime Analyzer is a powerful line-level pattern analyzer that provides functionality to identify performance bottlenecks in applications. In contrast to the classic .NET profiler, it allows users to analyze processes using native code. Therefore, performance issues caused by native code can be identified, for example, from 3rd party libraries like the .NET runtime. In addition, the tool supports event tracking to maximize user experience. File I/O activity, network...
